refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if A's bounding box is the same as B's.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The ~= operator returns TRUE if the bounding box of raster A is the same as the bounding box of raster B.

note.para: This operand will make use of any indexes that may be available on the rasters.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Very useful usecase is for taking two sets of single band rasters that are of the same chunk but represent different themes and creating a multi-band raster
refsection.programlisting: SELECT ST_AddBand(prec.rast, alt.rast) As new_rast FROM prec INNER JOIN alt ON (prec.rast ~= alt.rast);
